/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/scene_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/cuda_scene_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/cuda_path_tracer.cu.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o PA1-2   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  deps/vecmath/libvecmath.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcurand.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
